auth.welcomeMessage: Sign in to continue your mental health journey
auth.createAccountMessage: Sign up to start your mental health journey
auth.rateLimit: Too many login attempts. Please try again in {{minutes}} minutes.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Take a moment to check in with yourself. Your mental health matters.
dashboard.noHistory: No screening history yet. Start a screening above!
dashboard.privateDesc: Your data is only accessible by you

screening.description: Mental health screening with scientific questionnaires PHQ-9 & GAD-7. Free, private, and only takes 5 minutes.

phq9.title: PHQ-9
phq9.description: Measures the frequency of depression symptoms over the past 2 weeks

gad7.title: GAD-7
gad7.description: Measures the level of anxiety over the past 2 weeks

home.heroDescription: Mental health screening with scientific questionnaires PHQ-9 & GAD-7. Free, private, and only takes 5 minutes.
home.whyDescription: A mental health screening platform designed to help you recognize your mental condition early.
home.ctaDescription: Only takes 5 minutes. Free. Private. Small step for big change.

assessment.instructionPeriod: Over the last 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?
assessment.question: Question
assessment.errorSave: Failed to save results. Please try again.

result.consultationDesc: Find a psychologist or psychiatrist nearby for further consultation
result.monitorDesc: Take regular screenings every 2-4 weeks to see changes
result.infoPhq9: PHQ-9 is a globally standardized questionnaire for depression screening.
result.infoGad7: GAD-7 is a globally standardized questionnaire for anxiety screening.
result.infoDisclaimer: This result is indicative and not a medical diagnosis.
result.disclaimer: ⚠️ This screening result is NOT a medical diagnosis. If you are experiencing concerning symptoms, please consult a psychologist or psychiatrist immediately.
